resources.string: User can tap screen to skip splash
Compatible with older devices, smaller APK size
For modern devices, smaller APK size
Supports all devices, larger APK size
Auto switch based on system settings
Automatically translate after page loads without manual click
Background running: keep running after exit
One URL per line: URL or Name|URL
Add background music to app, supports loop or sequential playback
Beautiful UI enhancements for Bilibili: improved homepage, search, video pages and more
Extract Bilibili highest quality video and audio streams
Click to select or use button below
Please configure a model that supports module development in AI settings
Main domain and www subdomain are auto-matched. Add extra domains here (one per line)
Allow opening matching links from external apps
Are you sure you want to delete this app?
Are you sure you want to delete this icon from the library?
Hide app identity, prevent detection or uninstallation
ℹ️ Note: Disguise features require device admin permission to work fully. Multi-icon feature may be limited on some devices.
Replace, insert or delete code snippets at specified locations
Tap the button below to create your first app
Please enter activation code to continue
Auto detect project type and framework
Generate images using AI and embed them in HTML as illustrations
Get console.log output and error messages during page runtime
Go app preview failed to start
Hide original app icon from launcher
Unified hosts file, blocks ads and malware
e.g.: A blue gradient music player icon
Icons generated by AI will be saved here automatically
Isolated browser environment: fingerprint spoofing, multi-instance isolation
Node.js app preview failed to start
• AI API key configuration required • Complex features may need multiple adjustments • Recommend testing on test pages
Show app update download progress and installation notifications
Preview generated LRC effect, save after confirmation
Inject Service Worker cache layer for offline browsing of visited pages
Cache First — Fastest loading, content may be stale
Network First (Recommended) — Use latest content, fallback to cache offline
Stale While Revalidate — Show cache instantly, update in background
No displayable static files found in Python project (Backend apps require Python runtime support)
Python app preview failed to start
Create a modern minimalist personal homepage using TailwindCSS, including navigation, hero section, portfolio showcase, and contact info.
Create a glassmorphism style login page with dark gradient background, email/password inputs and social login buttons.
Create a cyberpunk style 404 error page with neon effects and glitch art animations.
Create a music player interface with dark theme, vinyl rotation animation, progress bar, and playback control buttons.
Create a weather card component that displays different icons and background gradients based on weather type.
Create a responsive image gallery with masonry layout and lightbox effect on click.
Create a todo app with add, complete, delete functions, storing data in localStorage.
Create a countdown page showing days, hours, minutes, seconds to a date, with flip card animation.
Click to generate a random app name
• Describe specific feature effects • Specify target website or page type • Refer to example requirements for guidance
Suitable for creating forms and data collection pages
Full-featured Todo app with add/complete/delete tasks, Material Design UI
Real-time system monitor showing CPU/memory/request stats, dark theme
Markdown notes app with create/edit/search, live preview
React 18 todo app, showcasing Hooks usage
Vue 3 reactive counter demo, showcasing Composition API
Vite + Vanilla JS weather app, no framework dependency
Select which features this capability can be used for:
Select icon or generate new one with AI
Show a draggable translate FAB at bottom right
App Store Coming Soon Discover & Share Amazing Apps

This app uses first principles design, not relying on traditional Node.js runtime:
• Built-in packager: Pure Kotlin implementation for simple projects • esbuild: Native binary compiled for Android, high performance • Progressive degradation: Always finds a working build solution
Recommended workflow: Complete npm run build on computer, then import build output.
💡 Test page will load selected modules, you can observe actual effects
Trim range (drag to select playback segment)
Bundle project and node_modules into a single file to reduce APK size
Compile TypeScript to JavaScript with esbuild before launch for faster startup
Explore the boundary of Web & APK
Use AI model to generate custom icon
Required config item \'%s\' has no value
Fix Unity/Canvas games displaying zoomed in with UI clipped
Write code directly in the app, no external files needed
Create or overwrite complete HTML pages
